chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. 3899 of 2014 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1.For hearing of Misc No.19720/2014 2.For hearing of main case. 04.10.2016 Mr. Mohammad Jamil advocate for petitioner Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi A.A.G ------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner has filed a statement that petitioner does not want to proceed further to this petition. The statement has been signed by the petitioner and his counsel. Learned A.A.G has no objection. In view of this statement, petition is disposed of accordingly along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
